results.title: Text Summarizer
results.response: {"content":"Sure! Please provide the article or its main details for me to help summarize it."}

item.name: Text Summarizer
item.description: Summarizes long pieces of text into concise summaries.
item.usage: To extract key points from an article or a report.
item.example_prompt: Can you summarize this article on climate change into a few main points?

results.example_prompt: Can you summarize this article on climate change into a few main points?

response_parsed.content: Sure! Please provide the article or its main details for me to help summarize it.

results.title: Image Caption Generator
results.response: {"content":"I'm unable to attach or receive images directly. However, you can describe the image to me, and I can help you generate a caption based on your description!"}

item.name: Image Caption Generator
item.usage: To provide context or descriptions for the provided images.
item.constraints: Images must be in JPG or PNG format.
item.example_prompt: Please attach an image and I'll generate a caption for it.

results.example_prompt: Please attach an image and I'll generate a caption for it.

response_parsed.content: I'm unable to attach or receive images directly. However, you can describe the image to me, and I can help you generate a caption based on your description!

results.title: Speech-to-Text Converter
results.response: {"content":"I'm unable to provide audio files, but I can help you with text-based inquiries or transcribe any text you provide. If you have specific audio content you need help with, please share the details, and I can assist you!"}

item.name: Speech-to-Text Converter
item.description: Transcribes spoken language into written text.
item.usage: To create a written record of spoken content.
item.constraints: Audio files should be under 5 minutes in duration.
item.example_prompt: Please provide your audio file so I can transcribe it.

results.example_prompt: Please provide your audio file so I can transcribe it.

response_parsed.content: I'm unable to provide audio files, but I can help you with text-based inquiries or transcribe any text you provide. If you have specific audio content you need help with, please share the details, and I can assist you!

results.title: Language Translator
results.response: {"content":"'How are you?' in Spanish is '¿Cómo estás?'."}

item.name: Language Translator
item.description: Translates text from one language to another.
item.usage: To convert phrases or documents into different languages.

response_parsed.content: 'How are you?' in Spanish is '¿Cómo estás?'.

results.title: Sentiment Analysis Tool
results.response: {"content":"The sentiment of the review is positive. The phrases \"excellent\" and \"works beautifully\" express a high level of satisfaction with the product."}

item.name: Sentiment Analysis Tool
item.description: Analyzes text to determine the sentiment expressed.
item.usage: To gauge the emotional tone behind a body of text.
item.example_prompt: What is the sentiment of this review: 'The product is excellent and works beautifully.'?

results.example_prompt: What is the sentiment of this review: 'The product is excellent and works beautifully.'?

response_parsed.content: The sentiment of the review is positive. The phrases "excellent" and "works beautifully" express a high level of satisfaction with the product.
